files_created.description: Activation contract — scope, preservation commitments, acknowledged gaps
D.2 panel → code panel ID mapping; state model runtime expression
Four traversal path sequences; enforcement gaps; validatePanelTransition logic
PERSONA_DEPTH_ENVELOPE; persona change rules; non-alteration confirmation
Fail-closed mechanisms; absent upstream output model; failure classification
Activation validation receipt; proof checklist; gap governance standing
This file — exact record of all D.3 file changes

changes.description: Updated contract header to include D.3 identifier and list D3.1–D3.6 additions

changes.name: PANEL_STATES
changes.description: Five canonical D.2 panel states: HIDDEN, AVAILABLE, ACTIVE, EXPANDED, LOCKED

changes.name: D2_PANEL_MAP
changes.description: D.2 panel name → code panel ID mapping; Drift and Remediation map to null (not implemented)

changes.name: D2_PATH_MAP
changes.description: Four D.2 traversal paths with canonical sequences and code panel ID sequences

changes.name: PERSONA_DEPTH_ENVELOPE
changes.description: Per-persona reachable panel sets and maxDepth values for EXECUTIVE, CTO, ANALYST

changes.name: computePanelState
changes.description: Pure function — derives D.2 canonical state for a panel given full session context

changes.name: _isValidNextStep
changes.description: Internal helper — checks if panelId is a valid next step from currentPanel on any path

changes.name: validatePanelTransition
changes.description: Pure function — returns {authorized, reason} for a proposed panel transition
Added PANEL_STATES, D2_PANEL_MAP, PERSONA_DEPTH_ENVELOPE, computePanelState, validatePanelTransition to TraversalEngine import

changes.name: traversalHistory
changes.description: useState([]) — ordered array of panel IDs visited in current governed session
setTraversalHistory([]) — reset traversal history on new governed session start
setTraversalHistory — append stepPanel to history on each guided step advance
setTraversalHistory([]) — clear traversal history on transition to Operator mode
